html:
Exclusive to:  

Thick Fur is an Item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It is dropped by the Bearger. Its only purpose is to be used to craft the Hibearnation Vest and the Insulated Pack.

Thick Fur is also included in the Hamlet DLC, however, the Bearger is not present. Instead, Thick Fur can be bought for 40 Oincs at 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium in the Pig City.

“A mat of thick fur.”
–Wilson
“It's fur all the way down.”
–Willow
“Is like hair on Wolfgang chest.”
–Wolfgang
“It smells like death.”
–Wendy
“MAXIMALLY THICK FUR”
–WX-78
“My, my! That is thick.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's as thick as my head!”
–Woodie
“This would make a nice rug.”
–Maxwell
“An effective thermal wave insulator.”
–Wagstaff
“It föught bravely, but I have claimed its hide.”
–Wigfrid
“It's so thick!”
–Webber
“Now I can hibernate in comfort.”
–Walani
“Feels warm.”
–Warly
“Smells badgerin' me nose.”
–Woodlegs
“BUT SOFT, 'TIS SOFT BUTT!”
–Wilba
“Poor guy”
–Wormwood
“Nice thick fur.”
–Wheeler
“Real soothing to run your fingers through.”
–Winona
“You won't be eating me today!”
–Wortox
“Stripy fluff.”
–Wurt
“It's so soft!”
–Walter
“It was either him or me.”
–Wanda
Thick Fur is an Item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It is dropped by the Bearger. Its only purpose is to be used to craft the Hibearnation Vest and the Insulated Pack.
Thick Fur is also included in the Hamlet DLC, however, the Bearger is not present. Instead, Thick Fur can be bought for 40 Oincs at 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium in the Pig City.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Lông Dày là một Vật Phẩm từ DLC Reign of Giants. Nó bị đánh rơi bởi Bearger. Mục đích duy nhất của nó là được sử dụng để chế tạo Áo Vest Ngủ đông và Gói Cách nhiệt.

'''Thick Fur''' is an [[Item]] from the ''[[Don't Starve: Reign of Giants|Reign of Giants]]'' DLC. It is dropped by the [[Bearger]]. Its only purpose is to be used to craft the [[Hibearnation Vest]] and the [[Insulated Pack]].
__NOTOC__
Thick Fur is also included in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, however, the Bearger is not present. Instead, Thick Fur can be bought for 40 [[Oinc]]s at [['The Sty' Oddities Emporium]] in the [[Pig City]].
